location.office_time_required: Monday, Wednesday, and Friday in office

level_signals: 7+ years in strategy, operations, or an analytical hybrid role
High-leverage IC role, explicitly not a management track
Reports directly to CEO, acts as force multiplier

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years in strategy, operations, or an analytical hybrid role at a high-growth tech company, with real time working alongside Product and Engineering
must_haves.qualifier: at a high-growth tech company, with real time working alongside Product and Engineering

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You build structure where none exists and drive decisions without formal authority
Credible across domains: Eng trusts your technical judgment, Finance and GTM trust your business rigor
Strong quantitative chops — economic models, data interrogation, signal vs. noise
Clear, direct communicator — executive-ready recommendations, not decks full of caveats
Thrives independently in ambiguity — high-impact IC, not a management track
Familiarity with technology ecosystems or business networks in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA), or experience supporting international market expansion and strategic partnerships.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Hands-on experience with AI tools, agents, or automation to increase analytical and operational velocity — we'd love to hear specifics
Background in developer tools, infrastructure, or AI/ML product companies
Track record influencing executive decisions at $50M+ ARR companies
Values clarity and momentum over process for process's sake

scope.surface: Cross-functional CEO priorities spanning Product, Eng, Finance, and GTM; strategic planning; MENA market expansion
primary_metrics_inferred: Speed and quality of cross-functional decisions
CEO leverage (problems resolved before reaching CEO)
core_responsibilities: Act as a trusted advisor to the CEO and exec team — elevate insights, prep leadership for key decisions, and when needed serve as a stand-in
Proactively resolve problems before they reach the CEO — you see around corners and close gaps
Coordinate the CEOs network to accelerate go-to-market including in international markets like MENA where there is existing regional expertise and existing strong relationships
DRI decisions that span Product, Eng, Finance, and GTM — surface risks and disagreements early, drive alignment where org structure creates friction
Develop integrated views of product economics, market dynamics, and business performance that no single function owns
Use AI, automation, and agent workflows to scale your impact: analysis synthesis, scenario modeling, status aggregation, operational monitoring
Support the CEO's most important cross-functional initiatives — competitive positioning, pricing strategy, product economics, strategic planning — from scoping through decision

green_flags: Explicit clarity on what the role is NOT — reduces ambiguity about scope
High-leverage IC role with direct CEO access
Clear success criteria stated ('How We'll Know It's Working')
Replit is a well-known platform with millions of users in a high-growth market
Encourages candidates from underrepresented and non-traditional backgrounds
red_flags: Compensation not disclosed — only 'Competitive Salary & Equity' mentioned
Hard in-office requirement (Mon, Wed, Fri) at Foster City, CA — no remote option
MENA familiarity listed under 'What We Look For' (hard requirements section) but reads like a preferred qualifier — ambiguous severity
No ATS job posting date available — unclear how fresh the posting is

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 7+ years requirement, IC framing, and CEO-adjacency)

scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from 'How We'll Know It's Working' section)

ambiguities: MENA familiarity appears under 'What We Look For' (which maps to must_haves per rules), but the phrasing ('Familiarity with... or experience supporting...') is softer than other hard requirements. Treated as hard per section placement, but noted here.
